user.title: Set Up Airfi
user.description: Scanning your network for Airfi devices.

fallback.title: No Devices Found
fallback.description: No Airfi devices were found automatically. You can try discovery again or add a device manually.

manual.title: Manual Setup
manual.description: If you need help with the configuration have a look at the [documentation]({documentation_url}).

discovery.title: Discover Airfi Devices
discovery.description: Scanning your network for Airfi devices.

discovery_select.title: Select Discovered Device
discovery_select.description: Found {count} Airfi device(s). Select one to continue.

discovery_confirm.title: Confirm Device
discovery_confirm.description:
**{model}** at {host} (serial: {serial})

Optionally give the device a custom name.

data_description.name: Leave empty to use the default name.

reconfigure.description: Update the credentials for this integration.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Integration
reauth_confirm.description: The credentials for {username} are no longer valid. Please provide updated credentials to restore access.

progress.discovering_devices: Searching your network for Airfi devices. This usually takes about 5 seconds, but can take up to 15 seconds.

error.connection: Unable to connect to the server.

abort.invalid_selection: The selected device is no longer available.

data_description.update_interval_hours: How often to refresh data from the API (0.25 to 24 hours)
data_description.enable_debugging: Enable detailed debug logging for troubleshooting
data_description.custom_icon: Override the default icon for entities (optional)

update_failed.message: Failed to update data from the server.

switch_turn_on_failed.message: Failed to turn on the switch.

switch_turn_off_failed.message: Failed to turn off the switch.

number_set_failed.message: Failed to set the target value.

init.title: Update API Endpoint
init.description:
Your device is using API version {api_version} which is deprecated. Please update to v2 for continued support and new features.

Click Submit to update your device to use the new API endpoint (v2). This will reload the integration.

init.title: Acknowledge Configuration Issue
init.description:
Some configuration options are missing or invalid. Please reconfigure the integration to ensure proper operation.

Click Submit to acknowledge this issue. You may need to reconfigure the integration if problems persist.
